description: Identity360-removed relationships not needed, removed organization entityType, added DVF, section-1,2,3 added from Privacy & Consent doc, added 3 simple attributes and 18 InteractionTypes

attributes.label: Country Name
attributes.name: CountryName
attributes.description: DO NOT USE this field - use Country instead

attributes.label: ISO3166-2
attributes.name: ISO3166-2
attributes.description: This field holds the ISO 3166 2-character country code.

attributes.label: ISO3166-3
attributes.name: ISO3166-3
attributes.description: This field holds the ISO 3166 3-character country code.

attributes.label: ISO3166-N
attributes.name: ISO3166-N
attributes.description: This field holds the ISO 3166 N-digit numeric country code.

attributes.label: Super Admin Area
attributes.name: SuperAdministrativeArea
attributes.description: This field holds the largest geographic data element within a country.

attributes.label: Admin Area
attributes.name: AdministrativeArea
attributes.description: This field holds the most common geographic data element within a country. For instance, USA State, and Canadian Province.

attributes.label: County
attributes.name: SubAdministrativeArea
attributes.description: This field holds the smallest geographic data element within a country. For instance, USA County.

attributes.label: Postal Code Extension
attributes.name: PostalCodeExtension
attributes.description: DO NOT USE this field - use Zip/zip4 instead

attributes.label: Locality
attributes.name: Locality
attributes.description: This field holds the most common population center data element within a country. For instance, USA City, Canadian Municipality.

attributes.label: Social Media
attributes.name: SocialMedia
attributes.description: Social media details of the individuals

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Terms of service, Privacy Policy, Marketing, Data Sharing, Data Processing, Others ( RDM Lookup)

attributes.description: Privacy Consent Status - Not seen, Seen, Opt In, Opt out

matchGroups.label: Rule2:Fuzzy(First Name, Last Name);Exact (Address Line1, Zip5); ExactOrNull(Suffix, Email)
Rule3:Fuzzy(First Name, Last Name);Exact (Identifier Id, Identifier Type)
Rule4: Exact(First Name, Last Name, City, Street Number) Fuzzy(Street Name)
Rule5: Fuzzy (First Name, Last Name); Exact(email)
Rule6: Fuzzy (First Name, Last Name); Exact(Phone)

roles.label: Prospect
roles.description: Individuals and Organizations can be Clients. Prospects are potential clients, who can be converted to customers of a product.

roles.description: Individuals and Organizations can be Clients. Clients are customers who have purchased products.
